# Bagh-e-Khas

Bagh-e-Khas is a premium fruit brand in Lahore, Pakistan. The website sells hand-selected seasonal fruits, premium mango boxes, fruit gift baskets, family fruit boxes, office fruit plans, and corporate gifting hampers.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://www.baghekhas.com/
- Sitemap: https://www.baghekhas.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.baghekhas.com/robots.txt
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/bagh_e_khas
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923277814489

## Main Offers

- Premium seasonal fruits
- White Chonsa Mango Box
- Premium Gift Basket
- Family Weekly Box
- Seasonal Fruit Box
- Corporate Gifting

## Service Area

Primary service area: Lahore, Pakistan.
